history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving straight ahead would take me to row 02 column C, which is lava, so that is unsafe. I should turn downward so I can go around the lava and head toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe, and it moves me toward the goal. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe. From there I can continue toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. Moving forward would hit the wall at row 05 column B, so I cannot go forward. The goal is to the right at row 04 column D, so I need to face right first. From facing down, turning counter-clockwise changes my direction to right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell to the right is row 04 column C, which is safe, and it moves me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. So I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right. The goal is immediately ahead at row 04 column D, so moving forward will reach it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
